svg.title: Bedroom closet memory fragment (apartment one)
svg.desc: Looking straight into the bedroom closet from the doorway: a warm cream interior softened by a single overhead bulb. A row of mismatched hangers carries blouses, a cardigan, a long dress, and a skirt across different years. Above the rod, a small shelf holds folded blankets, a shoe box, and an old handbag. A small lower ledge holds two perfume bottles, a hair-product bottle, and an old clothing iron with its cord trailing off the back. Two stacked shoe boxes sit on the floor next to a small backpack. The back of the closet darkens past the rod in a way that suggests it is deeper than it should be. Amber dust drifts through the warm light. One garment glows softly when hovered, the way a fabric remembers a scent.
